---
id: delete-source
title: "Delete project source"
description: "Delete a specific source (file, URL, or sitemap) from a project. This will remove the source and its indexed content."
sidebar_label: "Delete project source"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "delete api-method"
info_path: api/biel-ai-rest-api-beta
custom_edit_url: null
---

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete project source"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/api/v1/projects/{slug}/sources/{source_uuid}/"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Delete a specific source (file, URL, or sitemap) from a project. This will remove the source and its indexed content.

**Required permission:** `project_sources_delete`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>

</Heading>
